channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences receives final USFDA approval for Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Limited has received final approval from the USFDA for Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg. The capsules are indicated for the symptomatic treatment of dry mouth associated with Sjogren’s syndrome. Cevimeline is a muscarinic receptor agonist that stimulates salivary secretion. The annual sales of the drug were USD 26.9 mn. Zydus now has 436 approvals and has filed 505 ANDAs since FY 2003-04. The capsules will be produced at the Group’s manufacturing facility at SEZ-1I, Ahmedabad.

  • Zydus receives final approval from USFDA for Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg
  • Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg are indicated for the symptomatic treatment of dry mouth associated with Sjogren’s syndrome
  • Cevimeline is a muscarinic receptor agonist that stimulates salivary secretion
  • The annual sales of Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg were USD 26.9 mn
  • Zydus now has 436 approvals and has filed 505 ANDAs since FY 2003-04

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [HINDHARD] Hindustan Hardy Ltd Appoints Mr. Aurobind Ashabhai Patel as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Hindustan Hardy Ltd, at its meeting held on March 13, 2026, appointed Mr. Aurobind Ashabhai Patel as an Additional Director Designated as Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of five consecutive years from March 13, 2026, to March 12, 2031. Mr. Patel holds a bachelor's degree in commerce from Mumbai University and an MFA in design from Southeastern Massachusetts University. He has previously worked as a designer in New York and as Design Director of The Economist, London. He is currently a consultant to leading newspapers in India and elsewhere on matters of publication design. Mr. Patel is not related to any Director or Key Managerial Directors and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI Order or any other such Authority.

  • Appointment of Mr. Aurobind Ashabhai Patel as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Mr. Patel's appointment is for a term of five consecutive years from March 13, 2026, to March 12, 2031
  • Mr. Patel holds a bachelor's degree in commerce from Mumbai University and an MFA in design from Southeastern Massachusetts University
  • Mr. Patel has previously worked as a designer in New York and as Design Director of The Economist, London
  • Mr. Patel is not related to any Director or Key Managerial Directors and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI Order or any other such Authority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hindustan Hardy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NILACHAL] Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF and Pankaj Jalan Acquire Shares in Nilachal Refractories Ltd. Through Gift and Inter Se Transfer
item.description:
Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF and Pankaj Jalan have acquired shares in Nilachal Refractories Ltd. through a gift and inter se transfer. The total shares acquired by Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF amount to 1,65,000, which is 0.81% of the diluted share capital of the target company. Pankaj Jalan has acquired 3,67,000 shares, which is 1.80% of the diluted share capital of the target company. Niraj Jalan has acquired 1,50,000 shares, which is 0.74% of the diluted share capital of the target company. The transactions are exempted from making an open offer under Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF and Pankaj Jalan acquire shares in Nilachal Refractories Ltd.
  • The acquisition is through a gift and inter se transfer.
  • Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF acquires 0.81% of the diluted share capital of Nilachal Refractories Ltd.
  • Pankaj Jalan acquires 1.80% of the diluted share capital of Nilachal Refractories Ltd.
  • The transactions are exempted from making an open offer under Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NILACHAL] Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF Acquires 0.37% Stake in Nilachal Refractories Ltd
item.description:
Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF, a promoter/promoter group, has acquired 75,000 shares carrying voting rights in Nilachal Refractories Ltd, which amounts to 0.37% of the company's total voting capital. This acquisition was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The shares were acquired through an open market/off-market/public issue/rights issue/preferential allotment/inter-se transfer, and the acquisition date was 10.03.2023 or the date of receipt of intimation of allotment of shares, whichever is applicable.

  • Bhagwati Prasad Jalan & Sons HUF acquires 0.37% stake in Nilachal Refractories Ltd
  • Acquisition made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • 75,000 shares carrying voting rights acquired
  • Acquisition made through open market/off-market/public issue/rights issue/preferential allotment/inter-se transfer
  • Acquisition date: 10.03.2023 or date of receipt of intimation of allotment of shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [BERLDRG] Promoter Sudhir Sethi Acquires 0.10% Shares in Beryl Drugs Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure received under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Mr. Sudhir Sethi, the main promoter of Beryl Drugs Ltd, has acquired 4853 shares constituting 0.10% of the company. This acquisition is intimated by Mr. Sethi under Regulation 29(2) of the same regulations.

  • Sudhir Sethi, a promoter of Beryl Drugs Ltd, has acquired 0.10% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition is intimated under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The total number of shares acquired by Mr. Sethi is 4853.
  • The acquisition represents 0.10% of the total share capital of Beryl Drugs Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BERYL DRUGS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SACHEMT] Satishkumar Shah Acquires Major Stake in Sacheta Metals Ltd as Per SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Satishkumar Shah has disclosed the acquisition of shares in Sacheta Metals Ltd under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition details include Satishkumar Shah and Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) with him, who do not belong to the promoter/promoter group. The shares were acquired on the Bombay Stock Exchange. The total voting rights before and after the acquisition are 63.59% and 64.03% respectively. The equity share capital of the company remains at Rs. 25,00,00,000/- divided into 12,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each.

  • Satishkumar Shah acquires shares in Sacheta Metals Ltd
  • Acquisition under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • 64.03% total voting rights after acquisition
  • Equity share capital remains at Rs. 25,00,00,000/- divided into 12,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each
  • Transaction on the Bombay Stock Exchange

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SACHETA METALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BEMHY] Promoter Group's Sri Ramachandra Enterprises Pvt Ltd Transfers Shares to Mohta Capital Pvt Ltd in Bemco Hydraulics Ltd
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) & 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Bemco Hydraulics Ltd. Sri Ramachandra Enterprises Pvt Ltd, a promoter group, has transferred 11061940 shares to Mohta Capital Pvt Ltd. This transfer represents 25.29% of the total voting rights and total diluted capital of Bemco Hydraulics Ltd. The transfer was made as per the merger order passed by NCLT.

  • Sri Ramachandra Enterprises Pvt Ltd transfers 11061940 shares to Mohta Capital Pvt Ltd
  • Transfer represents 25.29% of the total voting rights and total diluted capital
  • Transfer made as per the merger order passed by NCLT
  • Bemco Hydraulics Ltd is the target company
  • Mohta Capital Pvt Ltd is the acquirer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BEMCO HYDRAULICS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [WMINIMT] Independent Director Paras Chand Jain Resigns from Western Ministil Ltd
item.description:
Western Ministil Ltd announced the resignation of its Independent Director, Paras Chand Jain, with effect from the closure of business hours on 12th March, 2026. Jain cited his personal commitments and pre-occupancy as the reason for his resignation. He will also cease to be a member of the Stakeholders Relationship Committee and Nomination and Remuneration Committee of the company.

  • Paras Chand Jain resigns from Western Ministil Ltd
  • Jain cites personal commitments as the reason for his resignation
  • Jain will cease to be a member of the Stakeholders Relationship Committee and Nomination and Remuneration Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WESTERN MINISTIL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAMKY] Ramky Infrastructure Ltd Secures 95-Year Concession for High-Tech Pharmaceutical Park in Maharashtra
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ramky Infrastructure Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Maha Integrated Life Sciences City Limited, has entered into a Concession Agreement with Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation (MIDC) for the development, operation, maintenance, and management of a High-Tech Pharmaceutical Park in Dighi Port Industrial Area, Mangaon & Roha Taluk, Raighad District, Maharashtra. The project, estimated to cost around INR 3,000 Crores, will be executed on a PPP basis for a period of 95 years, including a construction period of 5 years.

  • The project aims to provide a one-stop holistic solution to the Life Sciences and Pharma Sector, offering sustainable infrastructure.
  • Revenue will be generated through land lease premium, development charges, maintenance income for services, and operation income from utilities.
  • The project is expected to position Ramky Infrastructure Ltd as a major player in the Country with niche experience in the Life Sciences and Pharma Sector.
  • The total project cost is estimated at around INR 3,000 Crores.
  • The project includes the development of an Industrial Park over an area of 1000 hectares, primarily consisting of Industrial Zone, Commercial Zone, Common Amenities, Utilities, Open spaces and Roads.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMKY INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions 143 MW / 481 MWh Battery Energy Storage System in Rajasthan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd (ACME Solar) has commissioned 142.67 MW / 481.49 MWh of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in phase-1 out of its total planned BESS capacity of 585 MW / 2011.24 MWh. The BESS are located in Rajasthan, connected with existing operational Inter-State Transmission System (ISTS), and will run on merchant basis on short term basis, generating additional revenue stream through price differential between peak and non-peak demand hours. They are designed to enhance grid reliability and optimise power utilisation by charging batteries during non-peak demand periods and discharging during peak demand periods. ACME Solar's current portfolio requires installation of ~17 GWh of BESS in multiple phases across different states. The company has a diversified portfolio of 8,071 MW and an operational contracted capacity of 2,966 MW and 481 MWh of BESS capacity.

  • ACME Solar has commissioned 142.67 MW / 481.49 MWh of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in phase-1
  • The BESS are located in Rajasthan and connected with existing operational Inter-State Transmission System (ISTS)
  • The BESS will run on merchant basis on short term basis, generating additional revenue stream
  • The BESS are designed to enhance grid reliability and optimise power utilisation
  • ACME Solar's current portfolio requires installation of ~17 GWh of BESS in multiple phases across different states

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch
